dependencies.name: Gravity mains
dependencies.purpose: Primary pipe edges for proximity connectivity QA.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Pipe network analysis cannot be run.
dependencies.notes: Available in staged data for this phase.

dependencies.name: Manholes
dependencies.purpose: Primary access structures for endpoint matching.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Endpoint matching would overstate unmatched pipe ends.
dependencies.notes: Available in staged data for this phase.

dependencies.name: Force mains
dependencies.purpose: Pressure sewer segments that may connect separated gravity components.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Some apparent component breaks may be missing pressure-main connections.
dependencies.notes: Do not dismiss connectivity issues; use this as review context.

dependencies.name: Lift stations
dependencies.purpose: Pumping nodes that can connect gravity and force-main systems.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: A legitimate network break may look like a disconnected component.

dependencies.name: Pump stations
dependencies.purpose: Operational pump assets related to force-main connectivity.

dependencies.name: Treatment facilities
dependencies.purpose: Terminal wastewater facilities and system boundaries.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Terminal components may appear disconnected from downstream facilities.

dependencies.name: Service laterals
dependencies.purpose: Small service pipes that can explain isolated manholes or local endpoint patterns.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Some isolated structure findings may be expected or incomplete.

dependencies.name: Cleanouts
dependencies.purpose: Access points that may participate in local collection-system context.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Some endpoint context may be unavailable.

dependencies.name: Sewer basins
dependencies.purpose: Operational areas for reviewing completeness and jurisdictional boundaries.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Component classification cannot use basin context yet.

dependencies.name: Inspection records
dependencies.purpose: Condition and validation evidence for defects.
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Some defects require field or owner confirmation.

dependencies.name: Work orders
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Project lineage and repair context remain incomplete.

dependencies.name: Repair records
dependencies.effect_when_missing: Resolved historical conditions may still appear as active findings.
